# Scale

## Tags
balance, legal, license, right, rule, law, justice, weight, measure, compare, judge, fair, ethics, decision

## Categories
navigation, science, finance

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/scale)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Scale;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Scale { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
